extortion.description: Powers Miller Attorneys At Law is a civil litigation firm based in Northern California, specializing in liability cases, including homeowners and general liability, as well as insurance defense. The firm provides responsive and customized legal representation to insurance companies, businesses, and individuals across California and beyond. Their experienced team is dedicated to achieving positive outcomes for clients while maintaining a high level of customer service and professionalism. Powers Miller is recognized for its excellence in civil litigation and is committed to being a dependable advocate for their clients
